workExperience.description: Developed backend services for a Document Management System (DMS) focusing on secure document management and access control.
details: Developed backend services for Document Management System (DMS)
Designed and managed relational database using MySQL
Performed functional testing and user acceptance testing

workExperience.description: Selected as Top 24 Digital Talent in the 9th IndonesiaNEXT Innovation Challenge by Telkomsel, developing an AI-powered productivity platform called LockIn.
details: Developed LockIn, an AI-powered platform designed to help users stay focused and manage digital distractions
Implemented key features including Focus Mode, AI Journal, Tasks & Goals management, and a productivity dashboard
Collaborated with a multidisciplinary team including business strategist and product designer
Presented the solution to industry mentors and judges during the IndonesiaNEXT innovation program

workExperience.description: Contributed to research activities and organizational management within the Adaptive Network Laboratory.
details: Participated in research discussions and activities related to networking systems
Supported lab coordination and internal team management
Assisted in organizing lab programs and member activities
Handled basic HR-related tasks including coordination and team communication

projects.title: E-commerce Data Engineering Pipeline
projects.description: Designed and orchestrated an end-to-end e-commerce data pipeline simulating 100k+ marketplace transactions. Built hourly ETL workflows using Apache Airflow integrating PostgreSQL, Google Cloud Storage, and BigQuery. Implemented data quality validation with Great Expectations and monitoring using Grafana and Prometheus.

projects.title: End-to-End Data Engineering Pipeline with Airflow, dbt & Snowflake
projects.description: Built production-style data  pipeline using Airflow for orchestration, dbt for transformation, and Snowflake as the data warehouse. Automated ingestion, transformation, testing, and documentation in a containerized Docker environment.

projects.title: Weather ETL Pipeline
projects.description: Developed a production-ready ETL pipeline to extract weather data from a public API and load it into PostgreSQL. Orchestrated daily workflows using Apache Airflow with logging, retries, and monitoring.

projects.title: Hotel Booking Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Interactive dashboard analyzing 70k+ bookings to identify seasonality, cancellation trends, and channel performance.

projects.title: Document Management System Backend
projects.description: Developed backend services for a Document Management System (DMS) during internship at CELOE Telkom University. Designed relational databases using MySQL and implemented role-based access control (RBAC) for secure data access.

projects.title: LockIn – AI Productivity Platform
projects.description: LockIn is an AI-powered productivity platform designed to help users stay focused and manage digital distractions. The platform integrates focus tools, habit reflection, and progress tracking into a single system to support better productivity habits.

achievements.title: Finalist (Top 24) – 9th IndonesiaNEXT Innovation Challenge
achievements.description: Selected among 9,692 participants nationwide. Contributed in technical role to develop LockIn, an AI-powered productivity platform and presented at IndonesiaNEXT Summit 2025.

achievements.title: 2nd Place Winner – Cybersecurity Hackathon 'Ultimate Test Drive'
achievements.description: Awarded 2nd place for developing and presenting a cybersecurity solution in a national-level cybersecurity hackathon.

about.main: I’m Nisrina, a Computer Engineering undergraduate passionate about Data Engineering and Analytics.
about.journey: Currently studying at Telkom University (GPA 3.58), I focus on building scalable data pipelines, designing relational databases, and developing reliable backend systems.
about.passion: I enjoy transforming raw data into actionable insights and building systems that support data-driven decision making using Airflow, BigQuery, PostgreSQL, and cloud technologies.
about.connect: Feel free to explore my projects and connect with me for collaboration or opportunities.
